A

addEmployee(String, String, boolean) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Adds a new employee to the system.
addEmployee(String, String, boolean) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Inserts a new employee record.
addEmployee(String, String, boolean) - Method in class project2_root.models.ManagerActionsModel
Creates a new employee record with the given details.
addIngredient(String, double) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Adds a new ingredient to the system and returns its generated ID.
addIngredient(String, double) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Inserts a new ingredient and returns its generated id.
addIngredient(String, double) - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
Adds a new ingredient to the database with zero starting stock.
addItemToOrder(int, int, int, int, int, int, int) - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderPageModel
Stages a new OrderItem with the given customization parameters.
addItemToOrder(int, OrderItem) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Adds a new item to a specific order.
addItemToOrder(int, OrderItem) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Adds one line item to an order and updates the order total.
addMenuItem(String, double, Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Adds a completely new item to the menu.
addMenuItem(String, double, Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Inserts a new menu item and its ingredient recipe.
addMenuItem(String, double, Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class project2_root.models.ManagerActionsModel
Creates a new menu item with the given name, cost, and ingredient associations.
AppNavigator - Class in project2_root
Central navigation entry point for the JavaFX app.
AppSession - Class in project2_root
Singleton session holder for the currently logged-in employee.

B

buildIngredientMap(Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class project2_root.models.ManagerActionsModel
Filters a raw ingredient quantity map down to only entries with a quantity greater than zero.
buildOrderItems(Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
Filters a raw quantity map down to only non-zero entries suitable for order submission.

C

canGenerateZReport() - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Checks if a Z-report (end-of-day financial and inventory summary) can be generated now.
canGenerateZReport() - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Returns whether today's Z-report can still be generated.
canGenerateZReport() - Method in class project2_root.models.ZReportModel
Returns whether the current business day can be closed with a new Z-report.
clear() - Method in class project2_root.AppSession
Clears the current session state.
close() - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Closes the active JDBC connection.
completeCurrentOrder(int) - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderPageModel
Finalizes the current order by: Creating a new order in the database Inserting all staged items Decrementing ingredient quantities Marking the order as complete Clearing staged items
completeOrder(int) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Adds OrderItems attached to the orderID to the database itself.
completeOrder(int) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Completes an order.
confirmOrder(int) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Confirms a restock order as received and stocked.
confirmOrder(int) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Confirms a restock order and applies its quantities to ingredient stock.
confirmOrder(int) - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
Confirms a restock order by ID directly.
confirmSelectedOrder() - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
Confirms the currently selected order via the database, which marks it as confirmed and increments ingredient stock levels.
connect(String, String, String) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Opens the JDBC connection used by this database adapter.
Controller - Interface in project2_root.controllers
Common interface for FXML controllers that receive an injected screen model.
CouldNotLoadScene - Class in project2_root
Fallback scene shown when a normal FXML scene cannot be loaded.
CouldNotLoadScene() - Constructor for class project2_root.CouldNotLoadScene
Creates the fallback error scene with a simple centered message.
createOrder(int) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Creates a new order associated with an employee.
createOrder(int) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Creates a new order shell for the given employee.

Controller for the Create Restock Order view.
CreateOrderController() - Constructor for class project2_root.controllers.OrderInventoryControllers.CreateOrderController
 
createOrderIfNeeded(int) - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderPageModel
Ensures an order exists for the current session.

D

decrementIngredientsForItem(OrderItem) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Decrements inventory stock for each ingredient in an order item.
decrementIngredientsForItem(OrderItem) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Decrements ingredient stock according to the recipe and quantity of a completed order item.

getCriticalIngredients() - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
Returns all ingredients whose current stock falls below the threshold needed to cover OrderInventoryModel.WEEKS_TO_COVER weeks of projected demand.
getCriticalIngredients(int) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Identifies all ingredients that are considered critical given sales projections.
getCriticalIngredients(int) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Returns ingredients that fall below the projected coverage threshold.

Returns the employee currently stored in the session.
getCurrentOrderId() - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderPageModel
Returns the ID of the active order, or -1 if no order is active.
getCurrentOrderItems() - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderPageModel
Returns the currently staged (not yet committed) order items.
getCurrentZReportPreview() - Method in class project2_root.models.ZReportModel
Builds an in-memory preview of the Z-report without finalizing it.

Returns a record of how much of each ingredient was used in orders between two dates.

Returns ingredient usage totals between two dates.
getIngredientUsage(LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class project2_root.models.ProductUsageModel
Returns total ingredient servings consumed by completed orders whose completion date falls within [start, end] inclusive, ordered by servings used descending.

Queries the historical or current sales between two dates, optionally aggregated weekly.
getSalesBetween(LocalDate, LocalDate, boolean) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Returns sales totals between two dates using either weekly or monthly buckets.
getSalesBetween(LocalDate, LocalDate, boolean) - Method in class project2_root.models.ManagerModel
Retrieves total sales grouped into time buckets across a date range.

Updates basic details on an employee, such as names or manager status.

Updates an employee's basic profile and manager flag.

Persists changes to an existing employee record.

Updates an existing menu item with new properties and ingredients.

Updates a menu item and replaces its ingredient recipe.
saveMenuItem(int, String, double, Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class project2_root.models.ManagerActionsModel
Persists changes to an existing menu item, including its ingredient quantities.

Binds the model used by this controller.

Binds the login model used by this screen.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.ManagerActionsControllers.EmployeeEditController
Injects the model and populates the employee list on load.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.ManagerActionsControllers.ManagerActionsController
Injects the shared model instance.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.ManagerActionsControllers.MenuItemEditController
Injects the model, loads the full ingredient list, and populates the item list and a blank ingredient editor on initial load.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.ManagerController
Initializes the controller with its backing model and wires UI listeners.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.OrderInventoryControllers.CreateOrderController
Injects the model, loads all ingredients, builds the spinner list, and shows the summary panel on initial load.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.OrderInventoryControllers.OrderDetailController
Injects the model and immediately populates the view with the currently selected order's details.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.OrderInventoryControllers.OrderInventoryController
Injects the model, updates navigation visibility based on the current session role, and populates both panels on load.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.OrderPageController
Injects the model into this controller and initializes UI bindings, list view behavior, toggle groups, and menu item loading.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.ProductUsageController
Injects the model, configures the chart, sets default date values, and attaches change listeners to both date pickers before performing the initial chart load.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.XReportController
Binds the X-report model and populates the initial view state.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.controllers.ZReportController
Binds the Z-report model and populates the initial view state.
setModel(Model) - Method in class project2_root.SceneLoader
Sets the model passed to the loaded controller.

Shows the restock-order creation screen for managers.
showEmployeeEdit() - Method in class project2_root.AppNavigator
Shows the employee editor for managers.
showLogin() - Method in class project2_root.AppNavigator
Shows the login screen with no session requirements.

Shows the manager actions hub for managers.

showMenuItemEdit() - Method in class project2_root.AppNavigator

showProductUsage() - Method in class project2_root.AppNavigator

showXReport() - Method in class project2_root.AppNavigator
Shows the X-report view for managers.
showZReport() - Method in class project2_root.AppNavigator

submitRestockOrder(Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in interface project2_root.database.POSDatabase
Submits a new restock order specifying exact quantities for each ingredient requested.
submitRestockOrder(Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class project2_root.database.SQLServerPOSDatabase
Creates a new restock order with one row per requested ingredient.
submitRestockOrder(Map<Integer, Integer>) - Method in class project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
Submits a new restock order with the given ingredient quantities.

W

WEEKS_TO_COVER - Static variable in class project2_root.models.OrderInventoryModel
The number of weeks of projected demand that ingredient stock must cover before an ingredient is considered sufficiently stocked.
